APPEARANCES - ATTY. J. MAXWELL COOPER OF THE KESSENICK GAMMA & FREE LLP, TEL. NO. 1-415-568-2015 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT AMERICAN COLLEGE OF TRADITIONAL CHINESE MEDICINE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. The court will not consider the First Amended Complaint filed on November 24, 2015. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/ehg
